products.sectionSubtitle: Discover our complete line of premium cleaning products

floralPassionate.name: Floral Passionate
floralPassionate.ingredients: Water, natural surfactants, rose oil, diverse floral blend
floralPassionate.usage: For floor, wall, and general surface cleaning
floralPassionate.directions: Mix 1 part with 4 parts water. Use with damp cloth
floralPassionate.precautions: If in eyes, rinse with water. If ingested, contact poison control

lavenderKerry.name: Lavender Kerry
lavenderKerry.ingredients: Water, natural surfactants, French lavender oil, plant protein
lavenderKerry.usage: For general cleaning and dry cleaning
lavenderKerry.directions: Use directly 2-3 drops per surface. Dampen with water and wipe
lavenderKerry.precautions: If uncomfortable, stop use and rinse thoroughly

teaTreeFlash.name: Tea Tree Flash
teaTreeFlash.ingredients: Water, natural surfactants, green tea oil, natural disinfectant
teaTreeFlash.usage: For warm cleaning, kitchen, and bacteria-related stains
teaTreeFlash.directions: Mix 1 part with 3 parts water. Use undiluted for heavy stains
teaTreeFlash.precautions: Test for color fastness before using on delicate surfaces

faq.sectionSubtitle: Find answers to common questions about Captain Maid products

questions.q: Are Captain Maid products safe for children?
questions.a: Yes, all our products have been tested for safety and are suitable for use in homes with children. However, they should be kept away from children and pets.

questions.q: How do I use this product?
questions.a: Follow the instructions on the product label. All our products come with clear instructions and details, or you can check the product page on our website.
Yes, we offer free shipping on all orders. There are no additional shipping costs.
We offer a 30-day satisfaction guarantee. If you're not satisfied, we'll refund 100% with no questions asked.

questions.q: How long is the shelf life?
questions.a: Most products have a shelf life of 24 months from the manufacturing date. Please check the date on the packaging.
Weight varies depending on the product. Please check the product details for weight information.
Yes, we offer discounts for bulk orders. Please contact our sales team.

questions.q: Is the product safe for pets?
questions.a: Our products are safe for pets, but should be used carefully and not ingested by pets.

questions.q: Are there certifications from Thai health authorities?
questions.a: Yes, our products are certified by the Thai FDA and other relevant agencies.

questions.q: How many package sizes are available?
questions.a: Standard size is 500 ml. We may offer other sizes in the future. Stay tuned for updates.
